headline: DHI Q2 Deep Dive: Market Share, Cost Savings, and Inventory Management Offset Revenue Miss
summary: Homebuilder D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales falling 2.3% year on year to $7.56 billion. On the other hand, the company’s full-year revenue guidance of $34 billion at the midpoint came in 1.1% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.24 per share was 5.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
